name: T3.2-phase-2b-1440p-known-hang
description: Phase 2b 1440p known-hang reproduction. Same writer set as T3.1 but HLS at 1440p @ 10Mbps. This is the configuration that triggered the IOGPUFamily kernel deadlock on the main app on 2026-04-11 at 13:32 (failure mode 4). Expected FAIL-KILLED on the real-capture main-app path; behaviour on the synthetic-content harness is the open question. If this PASSES on synthetic, the failure is specific to real-capture content characteristics. If this FAILS on synthetic, the synthetic harness can reproduce the hang and Tier 5 sweeps become actionable here rather than needing Tier 4 real capture. DANGER — do not run batched with other configs; the watchdog/marker scaffolding exists for this test.
